title: A drop of dew
titleNative: つゆのひとしずく～「植田正治」の写真世界を彷徨う～
synopsis: Working since before WW2, UEDA Shoji pierced through amateurism, Then, in his picture world he takes, cuts and rearranges photos through his own sensibility, which takes him to the new media that is Ga-nime, encouraged by his friend the actor SANO Shiro, born in the same prefecture. The pictures used for this exhibition are not only from his most famous “Dune Mode” series, but also of many pre/post-war pictures of his birthplace, streetcars running in Tokyo, and traditional scene of Japan, through which a whole culture appears. Source: Toei-anim.co.jp

tags.name: Historical

title: Asari-chan: Ai no Marchen Shoujo
titleNative: あさりちゃん 愛のメルヘン少女
synonyms: Super Gal Asari: The Dreaming Girl in Fairy World
synopsis: Movie produced by Toei Animation after the anime series, Super Gal Asari and by the original manga by Mayumi Muroyama. Asari and her family go through more unlucky happenings.

tags.name: Shoujo
tags.description: Target demographic is teenage and young adult females.

title: Nui Nui Hinobori San Kyoudai
synopsis: The series will center on the three Hinobori brothers, who run a stuffed toy shop called "Nui Nui" at the end of Tokyo's Kappabashi shopping street. The eldest brother Kaede is the manager, the second son Aoi is in charge of patterns, and the third son Akane is in charge of displays. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Ojamanga Yamada-kun (Movie)
titleNative: おじゃまんが山田くん

title: Ukkari Pénélope
synopsis: Meet Penelope, the absent-minded young koala. Rarely seen without Deudeu – her favourite stuffed rabbit – Penelope likes nothing more than finding another adventure in the most unlikely of places. A simple gust of wind blowing her hat away can lead to Penelope running her own stall atop a tree stump where she trades flowers for apples, and paper planes for acorns. From games of hide and seek with her friends, to playing with the bubbles in the bath or counting sheep during nap time, Penelope’s life is never dull – even if she does wear odd socks when she gets herself dressed in the morning. (Source: Anime-Planet)

title: Bouningen weekend
synopsis: Shorts focusing on the daily life of a human and their cat.

title: Fuichin-san
synopsis: The story is about Fuichin, a young tomboy girl living in Manchuria. Based on Toshiko Ueda's experience.

title: Kirari Kagayaku
synopsis: Tekken is the tourism ambassador for Omachi in the Nagano Prefecture. It is his home town. The short is a story based on men's and women's romance set within the city and features the Shinano-Omachi Station, the Omachi hot springs village, the Omachi Mountain Museum, etc. Tekken stated to Oricon News that it took him 3 months to write the story. The film contains 2381 hand drawn pages.

title: Annyeong Jaduya
synopsis: Set in the ordinary family and its days from 1978 to the early 1980s in Korea, it tells the pleasant, heartwarming story of five families: a tomboy girl Choi Ja-Du, a drunk father Choi Ho-Dol, a Scrooge mother, Kim Nan-Hyang, and a smart sister Choi Mi-Mi and a mischievous brother Choi Seung-Gi and teacher Lee Mi Ja and teacher Jo Yong Pal. The story of shrewd and loving Jadoo with family and friends gives viewers cute fun and laughter.

title: I'll Just Live In Bando
synonyms: I Want to Live on the Peninsula
synopsis: 46-year-old Oh Jun-Koo struggles between following his dreams of becoming an actor and focusing on his teaching career to support his family. Debuted at the 2017 Annecy International Animation Film Festival

title: PetitCure: Precure Fairies Season 3
titleNative: ぷちきゅあ～Precure Fairies～ シーズン3
synopsis: In Season 3, in addition to the familiar Mysterious Amusement Park and Candy Paradise, many new locations—including a lively performance stage—will make their debut! Furthermore, joining the ranks of our active heroes like PetitCure Mofurun and PetitCure Pollun, new friends such as PetitCure Purirun and PetitCure Meroron will also be appearing! Everything is even cuter when you're with a friend! ♪ Please look forward to more heartwarming and humorous stories that will leave you feeling cozy and healed by all the cute PetitCure. ♡ (Source: Official Website)

title: Kotowaza House
synopsis: A public service proverb-of-the-week anime. Peter the salary man lives a very unhealthy lifestyle, starving then bingeing until he feels seek, or slobbing around the house until badgered into taking up exercise, during which he invariably pulls a muscle. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: ToyotaMirai : HOPE: The Hydrogen Society and Energy Sources of the Future
titleRomaji: HOPE: Suiso Shakai to, Korekara no Energy no Hanashi
titleEnglish: ToyotaMirai : HOPE: The Hydrogen Society and Energy Sources of the Future
titleNative: HOPE～水素社会と、これからのエネルギーのはなし～
synopsis: A Toyota commissioned commercial explaining their hydrogen line of new cars (Toyota Mirai) while also gently explaining the purpose/reason why hydrogen technology is important for the future of the planet and how it helps reduce environmental issues. Note: An English version of this advertisement titled "ToyotaMirai : HOPE: The Hydrogen Society and Energy Sources of the Future" was uploaded on the Toyota Global YouTube channel on Apr 28, 2015.

title: Bugburger
synopsis: In a dimly lit kitchen as a chunk of meat is sliced, bugs creep out from the cut. Ordinary action like cooking transforms to the weird and creepy. 1st year work 2015, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Zhui Xu 2nd Season
synopsis: In the eighth year of Jinghan, the neighboring countries in the north of the Wu Dynasty were at war, and the south was temporarily at peace. When Ning Yi and Su Tan'er came to Lin'an City to do business, they suddenly encountered a dragon turning over. The bandit Thirteenth Army took advantage of the situation to capture Lin'an, causing the couple to be separated. The captured Ning Yi met the Thirteenth Army leaders Liu Xigua, Chen Fan and others one after another. They cherished each other and were both enemies and friends. In the midst of the disputes between the family and the country, the great Confucianists defended the way, heroes rose up, and the world changed...
